title: Project map
summary: The deck walks from authoring goals through runtime boundaries, comparison flows, validation, and maintenance focus.
note: The browser feels direct, but the server still owns writes, rendering, and validation.

cards.title: Authoring loop
cards.body: Plan the deck, edit structured slides, and keep project context close.

cards.title: Runtime model
cards.body: Use one DOM renderer, narrow write paths, and session-only candidates.

cards.title: Validation and archive
cards.body: Gate geometry, text, media, rendering, and the exported project snapshot.
